title: Integration of External APIs in monday.com Apps: Compliance and Security Inquiry
excerpt: Can monday.com marketplace app developers integrate and utilize external paid APIs (e.g., OpenAI, LinkedIn, Twitter) within their apps, effectively acting as intermediaries to provide services to monday.com marketplace u…

posts.author: ethanolle1 (Ethan Sayagh)
posts.cookedHtml: Can monday.com marketplace app developers integrate and utilize external paid APIs (e.g., OpenAI, LinkedIn, Twitter) within their apps, effectively acting as intermediaries to provide services to monday.com marketplace users? Concerns relate to compliance and security. Thank you.

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t see why not. If you’re willing to pay for the API usage and do the compliance, go for it.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Many of the apps in the marketplace are meant to integrate with external services like Slack. Very common. As a developer you of course are responsible for security and compliance - but that would be the same if you didn’t integrate with external services.
